svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

topologyKey 検証 /
PV scheduling 検証 /
node 障害シミュレーション (worker drain)

div.div:
HA control-plane 構成
control-plane: 3 (奇数) + worker: N
自動生成: external-load-balancer
node (haproxy)
用途: control-plane 障害試験 /
etcd quorum 試験 /
production-like e2e

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 828px; height: 1px; padding-top: 497px; margin-left: 52px;

div.div:
リソース見積り (kind v0.31 / kindest/node v1.31)
node container 1 つあたり: vCPU ≈ 0.5–1.0, RSS ≈ 600–900 MB
control-plane × 3 + worker × 3 = 6 ノード ⇒ ホスト目安 8 vCPU / 8–10 GB RAM
